scripts.typecheck:unused-report: bun run typecheck:unused-report:website && bun run typecheck:unused-report:mcp
scripts.test:connect-gates: bun run --cwd website test:connect-gates && bun run test:runtime-smoke
scripts.test:release-gates: bun run test:ga-gates && bun run test:e2e
scripts.dev:exit: bun run require:clean-worktree && bun run check && bun run build && bun run test && bun run test:e2e && bun run test:e2e:auth && bun run test:connect-gates && bun run --cwd mcp ga:readiness && bun run --cwd website check:release-health && bun run --cwd website check:react-doctor && bun run --cwd website bundle:audit
scripts.staging:readiness: bun run check && bun run build && bun run test && bun run test:e2e && bun run test:release-gates && bun run --cwd mcp ga:readiness
scripts.staging:validate-env: bun run --cwd website validate:staging-env && bun run --cwd mcp validate:staging-env
scripts.check: bun run validate:toolchain && turbo run check
